structured-devices-v1.name: sw-core-01
structured-devices-v1.description: Core switch. Gateway 10.10.10.1 uses MAC 4a-a9-59-4b-b6-2f on VLAN10.

structured-devices-v1.name: rt-edge-01
structured-devices-v1.description: Edge router with address 10.10.10.11. It must not match exact 10.10.10.1.

structured-devices-v1.name: sw-access-legacy
structured-devices-v1.description: Legacy export keeps leading-zero IPv4 text 010.010.010.001; ip type cannot index it as a valid IPv4 literal.

structured-devices-v1.name: ap-lobby-01
structured-devices-v1.description: Lobby AP, guest wireless access, DHCP relay 172.16.5.1.

structured-devices-v1.name: sw-noise-time-59
structured-devices-v1.attributes: event_time=2026-05-23 12:59:06 interface=Ethernet1/0/59 vlan=59 firmware=4.9.59 build=06 serial=4aa9594bb62f trace=4aa959
structured-devices-v1.description: Noise sample: not a target MAC. Time 2026-05-23 12:59:06, VLAN 59, port 06, model X59-B6, administrator note.

structured-devices-v1.name: rt-noise-ip-boundary
structured-devices-v1.description: Boundary sample: 110.10.10.1 and 10.10.10.100 should not satisfy exact 10.10.10.1 intent.

device-configs-v1.config:
hostname sw-core-01
interface Vlan10
 ip address 10.10.10.1 255.255.255.0
 mac-address 4a-a9-59-4b-b6-2f
 description User gateway VLAN
 logging host 192.168.100.10
 ntp server 2001:db8::10

hostname rt-edge-01
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 10.10.10.11 255.255.255.0
 standby mac-address aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff
 route-map INTERNET permit 10
 set ipv6 next-hop 2001:db8::2

hostname fw-v6-01
set interface ethernet1/1 ipv6 2001:db8::1/64
set interface ethernet1/1 mac 4aa9.594b.b62f
set rulebase security rules allow-admin source 10.10.10.1
set rulebase security rules allow-admin log-start yes

hostname sw-access-legacy
interface vlan 1
 ip address 010.010.010.001 255.255.255.0
 mac-address 0011.2233.4455
 banner motd legacy device, verify before migration

hostname sw-noise-time-59
clock set 2026-05-23 12:59:06
interface Ethernet1/0/59
 switchport access vlan 59
 firmware version 4.9.59 build 06
 serial-number 4aa9594bb62f
 trace-id 4aa959
 description administrator touched port 06, not a mac address

hostname rt-noise-ip-boundary
interface Loopback10
 ip address 110.10.10.1 255.255.255.255
 ip route 10.10.10.100 255.255.255.255 Null0
 ipv6 address 2001:db8::1:59/128
 policy admin-down reason administrator-request
 event timestamp 2026-05-23 13:06:59
